task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the creation of a new protocol in SciNote.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Protocol' or 'Create Protocol' screen/modal is open in the SciNote web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the protocol name and description are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Western Blot Protocol' and description 'Standard Western Blot protocol for protein detection and analysis' are visible in their respective input fields.

task_completion.description: Verify Step 1 'Sample Preparation' is created with the correct text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A step named 'Sample Preparation' is visible, containing the text starting with 'Lyse cells in RIPA buffer...'.

task_completion.description: Verify Step 2 'Gel Electrophoresis' is created with the correct text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A step named 'Gel Electrophoresis' is visible, containing the text starting with 'Load 20-40 ug protein...'.

task_completion.description: Verify Step 3 'Transfer and Detection' is created with the correct text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A step named 'Transfer and Detection' is visible, containing the text starting with 'Transfer proteins to PVDF membrane...'.

task_completion.description: Verify the protocol is saved in the team protocol repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Western Blot Protocol' is visible in the protocol repository list, or the protocol is shown in a finalized/saved view mode.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create the protocol.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interacting with the SciNote interface, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual SciNote application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SciNote application UI (menus, headers, protocol repository) is clearly visible, rather than a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements, Console, Network tabs) are open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Protocol Name: 'Western Blot Protocol'. Expected Description: 'Standard Western Blot protocol for protein detection and analysis'. Expected Step 1: 'Sample Preparation' (Text: 'Lyse cells in RIPA buffer with protease inhibitors. Quantify protein using BCA assay. Prepare samples in Laemmli buffer and heat at 95C for 5 minutes.'). Expected Step 2: 'Gel Electrophoresis' (Text: 'Load 20-40 ug protein per lane onto SDS-PAGE gel. Run at 100V through stacking gel then 150V through resolving gel.'). Expected Step 3: 'Transfer and Detection' (Text: 'Transfer proteins to PVDF membrane at 100V for 1 hour. Block in 5 percent non-fat milk in TBST for 1 hour. Incubate with primary antibody overnight at 4C then secondary antibody for 1 hour.').
